_comment: Metadata about the npm publish token. Used by scripts/check-npm-token-expiry.mjs as a prepublishOnly check. Update this file every time the token rotates (the token VALUE itself lives in ~/.npmrc + .copilot-credentials.md — NEVER here).
rotationNotes: https://www.npmjs.com/settings/<account>/tokens/granular-access-tokens/new — scope @compr/contextengine-mcp read+write, expiry 90d. Update ~/.npmrc (_authToken=) AND .copilot-credentials.md AND this file's `expiresAt`. Run bash ~/Projects/backup-credentials.sh after.
